data.title: Trust Wallet launches zero transaction fee offer for BNB Chain, but users still need to pay gas fees
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Trust Wallet issued a statement saying that from 17:00 on March 20, 2025 to 16:00 on March 27 (UTC+8), all token transactions on BNB will be exempt from transaction provider fees. This offer is supported by 1inch and 0x. Users still need to pay network/gas fees, but transaction provider fees will be completely waived. This event only applies to transactions conducted through the transaction function within the Trust Wallet application, and third-party dApp transactions are not eligible.

data.title: Missouri Bitcoin Reserve Bill Enters Committee Stage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to Bitcoin Laws, the Missouri Bitcoin Reserve Bill HB1217 has been submitted to the House Special Committee on Intergovernmental Affairs. This is one of the slower-moving state-level strategic bitcoin reserve (SBR) bills and has now entered the committee stage six weeks after its introduction.

data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-03-20)
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $2.73T, up by 0.55% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $83,379 and $87,454 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $85,964, up by 2.91%.

Most major cryptocurrencies by market cap are trading mixed. Market outperformers include VIDT, BANANA, and VANA, up by 29%, 20%, and 12%, respectively.

data.title: LBank and the famous astrologer Hermione jointly held "Web3 Astrology, the fate of the crypto market in 2025 has turned" Space
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank and several well-known industry astrologers will hold a Space event with the theme of "Web3 Astrology, the Wheel of Fate of the 2025 Crypto Market Has Turned" at 8 pm on March 21. This cross-border dialogue between astrology and cryptocurrency brought together influential guests in the industry, including well-known astrologers Hermione, Yuejie Wendy, and Qimen Dunjia Master Jingfeng.
In Space, guests will reveal how planetary movements affect the trend of crypto assets in 2025, explore the mysterious connection between the cosmic star map and currency price fluctuations, and provide investors with market predictions based on astronomical laws. At the same time, MetaEra, TechFlow, Odaily and many other media will also join in to lead the audience to explore the mysterious connection between astrology and the crypto market.

data.title: Binance Wallet and PancakeSwap to Launch Exclusive Bedrock TGE on March 20
data.description: Binance Wallet has announced an exclusive Token Generation Event (TGE) for Bedrock, a multi-asset liquid re-staking protocol, in partnership with PancakeSwap. The event will take place on March 20, 2025, allowing participants to acquire Bedrock tokens (BDR) at a fixed price of $0.025 per token, with a maximum purchase limit of 3 BNB per Binance Wallet user.TGE DetailsStart Date: March 20, 2025, 10:00 AM (UTC)End Date: March 20, 2025, 12:00 PM (UTC)Total Raised Amount: $1.25 million (in BNB)Available Tokens: 50,000,000 BDR (5% of total supply)Accepted Token: BNBPrice per Token: $0.025 (in BNB)Subscription Limit per User: 3 BNB

data.title: Bitcoin Whale Addresses Show Signs of Accumulation in March
data.description: According to PANews, analysis by IntoTheBlock reveals that the balance of Bitcoin whale addresses has been declining over the past year. However, data from March indicates a potential reversal of this trend. As of now, Bitcoin held by whale addresses has increased by approximately 62,000 coins since the beginning of the month, suggesting new signs of accumulation in the market.

data.title: South Korean prosecutors raid Bithumb headquarters to investigate suspected misappropriation of funds to buy a personal apartment for former CEO
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: South Korean prosecutors raided the headquarters of cryptocurrency exchange Bithumb today to investigate allegations that it misappropriated company funds to support the former CEO's purchase of a personal apartment. The case was transferred by the Financial Supervisory Service and is still under investigation.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 630 USDT with a 1.95% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 20, 2025, 09:07 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 630 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 630.369995 USDT, with a narrowed 1.95% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Bedrock Token BR TGE is now available exclusively on Binance Wallet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Bedrock token BR TGE has been exclusively launched on Binance wallet.

data.title: Bakkt Bets Big on Crypto: Leadership Shakeup & Core Focus Strategy
data.description:
Bakkt Holdings appoints Akshay Naheta as co-CEO and refocuses on core crypto services, including stablecoin integration, while streamlining operations.

The post Bakkt Bets Big on Crypto: Leadership Shakeup & Core Focus Strategy first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/03/20/bakkt-bets-big-on-crypto/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=bakkt-bets-big-on-crypto
